meaning: adj.勇敢的,英勇的n.勇敢的人
examples: They talked modestly of their valiant efforts to keep the tanker afloat.
She made a valiant attempt not to laugh.
Despite valiant efforts by the finance minister, inflation rose to 36%.
However, it was young, valiant San Franciscan engineer, William Hammond Hall, who took on the 20-year project.
Efforts to solve challenges in the most challenging parts of the world are valiant.
